1.desc: To get ready for her poolside experience, Janus ordered a cute and classy swimsuit for herself.

finished_word: Woah... It looks exactly as I imagined! C-Commander, thank you very much!
intro_word: C-Commander, um... I have a minor request... Would you please hear me out?
ongoing_word: I'm so excited... I mean, umm.. I, I'll be waiting right here for you...

2.desc: To experience the thrill of extreme sports, Mogador ordered a full set of gear for herself, complete with safety features.

finished_word: Haah... Now, a new bond has been forged between us~♡
intro_word: Commander, if you have a moment... There's a little request I'd like you to do for me... You'll hear me out, right~♡
ongoing_word: Don't worry, take your time... Hehehe~♡

3.desc: To accompany the Commander throughout various activities during their vacation, Saint Louis ordered a dress with a simple design.

finished_word: That's exactly what I was looking for. I'll be sure to treasure this act of virtue...
intro_word: Commander, there's something I want you to get for me.
ongoing_word: I have no intent on interfering with your plans. I shall wait right here quietly.

4.desc: U-2501's order also came with an invitation – one for a special candlelit dinner for herself and the Commander.

finished_word: Got it! Thank you so much... One sec, let me record this moment... [>w<]
intro_word: Commander... there's something I want... Here's a sticky note... [Can you please get it for me? >w<]
ongoing_word: Commander's actually... doing this for me... [o(//▿//)q]

5.desc: Emden was particularly excited about her swimsuit and ordered one that would fit 'both' of her aesthetic sensibilities.

finished_word: This exceeds Emden's expectations... 'Indeed. You have done well. We are satisfied.'
intro_word: My dear human, I shall give you a chance to fulfill Emden's wishes.
ongoing_word: 'Make sure not to disappoint us.' Emden is waiting right here for you...

6.desc: Götz wanted to create an unforgettable romantic surprise, so she ordered 9,999 red roses.

finished_word: Yes, this is excellent indeed. I shall display this in our private quarters.
intro_word: Commander, I have but a single request, but it is important.
ongoing_word: How exciting. I am eagerly awaiting your good news.

7.desc: Amagi seems to be preparing a special performance, and has put in a rather unusual swimsuit order for it.

finished_word: It looks even better than I had expected... I am most impressed by your sensibilities, Commander.
intro_word: Commander, I have a request, but... it's rather hard to put into words, so can I draw it for you later?
ongoing_word: I am confident that you will be able to make the necessary arrangements.

8.desc: Prinz Moritz ordered a rather exotic swimsuit. Apparently, it is meant to help her look more in-character for a role she's playing.

finished_word: Perfect! I'd expect nothing less from you, Commander! Now, I wonder what sort of inspiration this will give me~♪
intro_word: Heeehehehe~♪ I'm gonna pass this order straight on to you, Commander!
ongoing_word: Shall we compose an impromptu ghost story together?

9.desc: The curtain is about to rise on a lively night banquet. For such an occasion, August has ordered an exquisite evening dress.

finished_word: ...I never thought it would be this perfect. If there are any wishes you'd like to have granted, just come to me.
intro_word: I bear a secret wish meant for your ears only... Would you grant it for me?
ongoing_word: I shall wait right here. See it through however you deem fit.

10.desc: Z15, searching for a new water-capable vehicle, ordered a rather unconventional way to get across the water.

finished_word: Woow, you're gonna fulfill all my wishes just like that. Looks like I've got to 'return the favor' properly~♪
intro_word: Commander, would you please grant my wish? Pretty please? ...Then, take this order~♪
ongoing_word: Heeey, wanna play a game? Anything's fine. You can decide~

11.desc: Z52 ordered a set of high-speed surfing gear to work up a good sweat while out on the waves.

finished_word: So fast! And it's exactly what I wanted! Thanks a bunch, Commander!
intro_word: Woooah! Close one, almost blew right past – Oh, Commander, I have a request for you! It's about this order!
ongoing_word: Huh? Nah, I'm not bored at all. Watching you work is the best pick-me-up!

12.desc: To enjoy a sweet, leisurely afternoon, Cheshire ordered a visually-stunning limited-edition dessert tower.

finished_word: Aww~ are you done already? Even though I just wanted to stay with you a bit longer, Owner~ Huh? That's okay? Yaaay~♪
intro_word: Owwwnerrr! Come give me a biiiiig hug! Orders? Oh right, I've got one here~
ongoing_word: Owner, you look so dashing when you're hard at work~

13.desc: Chang Wu seems interested in the jade processing techniques commonly seen across Luxury Bay, and as such, has sent me a special request.

finished_word: You're so very reliable, Commander. Thanks to you, I'll be able to refine my craft even further.
intro_word: Commander, there's something I'd like to ask of you...
ongoing_word: Once things have settled down, would you like to try some of the tea I brought?

14.desc: Gouden Leeuw wanted to commemorate this occasion, ordering nature-themed accessories.

finished_word: Commander, well done. You've really saved me. Please feel free to rest on my shoulder~
intro_word: Commander, I happen to have an interesting idea. Would you fulfill a little request for me?
ongoing_word: I am gradually beginning to feel it... the breath of nature...
